description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with brown shingles and a light green facade accented by white trim. The front includes a small covered porch with a white railing, a prominent awning, and a main entry door with a small overhang. Large triangular windows are set high on the front gable, allowing ample natural light into the upper level. The sides of the house are mostly plain, with minimal window openings, while the rear has a large garage-style door and two small windows. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from wood and concrete, with glass windows and a shingled roof. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A light green house with a steep brown gable roof, white trim, a covered porch, and large triangular front windows. The design is simple, with minimal side windows and a garage door at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry with a covered porch, white railing, awning, and large triangular windows above.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the long, plain wall with a single small window and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a large garage-style door and two small windows, with the roof's peak visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the plain wall with a single window and the porch extending from the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large triangular front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a small covered porch with white railing, an awning, and a single door with a small overhang.
